ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_standards" (
  "sizing_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard */,
  "sizing_standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing standard */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for the sizing standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of sizing standard (e.g., Numeric, Alpha) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the sizing standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "sizing_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the sizing chart belongs to */,
  "sizing_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing standard the sizing chart uses */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Details of the sizing chart (e.g., measurements, sizes) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., Numeric, Alpha, Mixed) */,
  "chart_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the sizing chart */,
  "chart_data_json" TEXT /* JSON representation of the sizing chart data for easy querying */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_sizing_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_standard_id") REFERENCES sizing_standards ("sizing_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "sizing_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing chart for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sizing_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("sizing_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Customer's loyalty points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates if the order is a gift */,
  "gift_message" TEXT /* Message for the gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the order item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product ordered */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product ordered */,
  "price_at_order" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory location */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_restocked" TEXT /* Date the product was last restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "sizing_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing standard the size conversion belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size in the original sizing standard */,
  "equivalent_size" TEXT /* Equivalent size in the target sizing standard */,
  "target_sizing_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target sizing standard */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the size (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_target_sizing_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_sizing_standard_id") REFERENCES sizing_standards ("sizing_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_sizing_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("sizing_standard_id") REFERENCES sizing_standards ("sizing_standard_id")
)
